chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 109 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2170/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2171/2024. 03.02.2026 Mr. Fahad Hussain Areejo, advocate for the applicant. 1. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&3. Learned counsel states that the matter is of remand therefore it may be just and proper for the reference application to be disposed of with directions that the adjudicating officer may decide the lis uninfluenced by any observation. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
